batch.title: Omnia Phase 3
batch.description: Omnia Phase 3 is SIS and BPCS project in addition to Phase 1 and Phase 2 in Omnia Site in Sasolburg

sis.title: SIS Logic Migration
sis.description: Migrated legacy emergency shutdown system to DeltaV SIS, achieving 99.9% availability and reduced spurious trips by 34%.

apc.title: Advanced Process Control
apc.description: Model Predictive Control on crude distillation unit. Stabilized product specs, reduced temperature variance 47% and fuel gas consumption 12%.

pharma.title: Pharma Cleanroom Automation
pharma.description: Full cleanroom HVAC and batch process control meeting FDA 21 CFR Part 11, integrated with LIMS. Reduced deviation events by 40%.

oilywater.title: Oily Water Separation Upgrade
oilywater.description: Retrofitted DeltaV control for TPI separators. Oil-in-water discharge below 5 ppm, saving $120k/year in compliance penalties.

gascomp.title: Gas Compressor Control Retrofit
gascomp.description: Anti-surge and load-sharing control for two 5 MW centrifugal compressors, improving efficiency by 8% and preventing surge incidents.

wastewater.title: Wastewater Treatment SCADA
wastewater.description: Complete SCADA replacement with DeltaV, integrating 12 remote pumping stations via Modbus TCP. Reduced energy use by 18%.

bioreactor.title: Bioreactor Batch Optimization
bioreactor.description: Applied advanced control strategies to mammalian cell culture, increasing product titer by 30% and consistency between batches.

sulfur.title: Sulfur Recovery Unit Revamp
sulfur.description: Redesigned Claus unit control with advanced tail-gas analysis, improving sulfur recovery efficiency to 96.5% and reducing H2S emissions.

flare.title: Flare Gas Recovery System
flare.description: Automated flare gas recovery compressors and control valves, recovering 98% of flare gas, saving $350k/year and reducing CO2 emissions.

ammonia.title: Ammonia Plant DCS Migration
ammonia.description: Migrated legacy Provox to DeltaV in a 2000 t/d ammonia plant; cut commissioning time by 25% using virtual commissioning.
